com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job

Class ExecuteTestCaseJobImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.JobImpl
      • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.impl.job.ExecuteTestCaseJobImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ExecuteTestCaseJob, Job

    public class ExecuteTestCaseJobImpl
extends JobImpl
implements ExecuteTestCaseJob
    A execution job for staring a test case.
    Since:
    TTworkbench 15

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ExecuteTestCaseJobImpl(java.lang.String id, java.lang.String sessionId, java.lang.String name, TestCase testCase, java.util.List<Parameter> parameters, Job parentJob, IPersistentLogModel logModel) 
      ExecuteTestCaseJobImpl(java.lang.String id, java.lang.String sessionId, TestCase testCase, java.util.List<Parameter> parameters, Job parentJob, IPersistentLogModel logModel)
      Creates an execution job for starting a test case.

      • ExecuteTestCaseJobImpl

        public ExecuteTestCaseJobImpl(java.lang.String id,
                              java.lang.String sessionId,
                              TestCase testCase,
                              java.util.List<Parameter> parameters,
                              Job parentJob,
                              IPersistentLogModel logModel)
        Creates an execution job for starting a test case.
        Parameters:
        id - the job ID
        sessionId -
        module - the test case module
        testCase - the test case name
        parameters - a list of test case parameters
